title: Microsoft Patches Entra ID Role Flaw That Enabled Service Principal Takeover
description: Agent ID Administrator enabled service principal takeover before April 9, 2026 patch, exposing privilege escalation risk in Entra ID tenants.

title: Microsoft Confirms Active Exploitation of Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202
description: CVE-2026-32202 actively exploited after April 27 advisory fix, exposing NTLMv2 hashes via zero-click SMB authentication.

title: Checkmarx Confirms GitHub Repository Data Posted on Dark Web After March 23 Attack
description: Checkmarx data surfaced after March 23, 2026 supply chain attack, prompting repository lockdown and investigation, raising exposure concerns.

title: ⚡ Weekly Recap: Fast16 Malware, XChat Launch, Federal Backdoor, AI Employee Tracking & More
description: This week’s ThreatsDay covers supply chain attacks, fake help desks, wiper malware, AI prompt traps, RMM abuse, phishing kits, and more.

title: Mythos Changed the Math on Vulnerability Discovery. Most Teams Aren't Ready for the Remediation Side
description: Claude Mythos’ April 7 launch accelerates vulnerability discovery, but limited access and rising false positives strain remediation workflows.

title: PhantomCore Exploits TrueConf Vulnerabilities to Breach Russian Networks
description: PhantomCore exploited three TrueConf flaws since September 2025, enabling remote access and lateral movement across Russian networks.

title: Researchers Uncover 73 Fake VS Code Extensions Delivering GlassWorm v2 Malware
description: 73 cloned VS Code extensions since Dec 21, 2025 fuel GlassWorm v2, installing cross-IDE malware and stealing credentials.

title: Fake CAPTCHA IRSF Scam and 120 Keitaro Campaigns Drive Global SMS, Crypto Fraud
description: Fake CAPTCHA IRSF scam sends up to 60 SMS messages since June 2020, exploiting 17 countries and costing victims $30 per attack.

title: Researchers Uncover Pre-Stuxnet ‘fast16’ Malware Targeting Engineering Software
description: Fast16 malware from 2005 predates Stuxnet by five years, targeting engineering software to sabotage calculations and reshape cyberwar history.

title: CISA Adds 4 Exploited Flaws to KEV, Sets May 2026 Federal Deadline
description: CISA adds 4 exploited CVEs including CVSS 9.9 SimpleHelp flaw, mandating FCEB mitigation by May 8, 2026 to reduce ransomware and botnet risk.

title: FIRESTARTER Backdoor Hit Federal Cisco Firepower Device, Survives Security Patches
description: FIRESTARTER backdoor hit Cisco ASA in Sept 2025, persists after patching CVE-2025-20333, risking continued federal network access.

title: NASA Employees Duped in Chinese Phishing Scheme Targeting U.S. Defense Software
description: NASA OIG exposed a 2017–2021 spear-phishing campaign by Song Wu, leading to DOJ charges and export control violations.

title: Bridging the AI Agent Authority Gap: Continuous Observability as the Decision Engine
description: AI agents inherit hidden authority from fragmented identities, creating a delegation gap that demands real-time governance.

title: 26 FakeWallet Apps Found on Apple App Store Targeting Crypto Seed Phrases
description: 26 FakeWallet apps since fall 2025 hijack crypto recovery phrases via Apple App Store China accounts, enabling wallet theft.

title: Tropic Trooper Uses Trojanized SumatraPDF and GitHub to Deploy AdaptixC2
description: Tropic Trooper used trojanized SumatraPDF and GitHub C2 in 2024 to deploy AdaptixC2, enabling covert VS Code tunnel access.

title: LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 Flaw Exploited Within 13 Hours of Disclosure
description: CVE-2026-33626 exploited within 13 hours of disclosure, enabling SSRF-based cloud credential theft and internal scanning.

title: UNC6692 Impersonates IT Help Desk via Microsoft Teams to Deploy SNOW Malware
description: UNC6692 targeted 77% senior employees between March 1–April 1, 2026, via Teams impersonation, enabling malware, data theft.

title: Bitwarden CLI Compromised in Ongoing Checkmarx Supply Chain Campaign
description: Bitwarden CLI 2026.4.0 was compromised via GitHub Actions in Checkmarx campaign, exposing secrets and distributing malicious npm code

title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: $290M DeFi Hack, macOS LotL Abuse, ProxySmart SIM Farms +25 New Stories
description: ThreatsDay Bulletin: active exploits, supply chain attacks, AI abuse, and stealth data risks observed this week.

title: [Webinar] Mythos Reality Check: Beating Automated Exploitation at AI Speed
description: AI-driven attacks collapse exploit windows, widening the patch gap and forcing faster vulnerability prioritization strategies.

title: Project Glasswing Proved AI Can Find the Bugs. Who's Going to Fix Them?
description: Mythos found decades-old vulnerabilities, yet fewer than 1% were patched, exposing a remediation gap.

title: China-Linked GopherWhisper Infects 12 Mongolian Government Systems with Go Backdoors
description: GopherWhisper infected 12 Mongolian government systems in January 2025, abusing Slack and Discord for C2, exposing wider espionage risks.

title: Vercel Finds More Compromised Accounts in Context.ai-Linked Breach
description: Vercel uncovered additional compromised accounts after expanding its probe into a Context.ai-linked breach, exposing OAuth and malware risks.

title: Apple Fixes iOS Flaw That Let FBI Recover Deleted Signal Messages
description: Apple fixes CVE-2026-28950 in iOS 26.4.2 after deleted notifications were retained, mitigating forensic data exposure.

title: Malicious KICS Docker Images and VS Code Extensions Hit Checkmarx Supply Chain
description: Malicious KICS Docker tags and VS Code versions 1.17.0, 1.19.0 enabled data exfiltration, risking exposed infrastructure secrets.

title: Self-Propagating Supply Chain Worm Hijacks npm Packages to Steal Developer Tokens
description: Self-propagating npm worm steals tokens via postinstall hooks, impacting six packages and expanding supply chain attacks.

title: Harvester Deploys Linux GoGra Backdoor in South Asia Using Microsoft Graph API
description: Harvester deploys Linux GoGra via Microsoft Graph API in South Asia, targeting India and Afghanistan since 2021, enabling covert espionage

title: Lotus Wiper Malware Targets Venezuelan Energy Systems in Destructive Attack
description: Lotus Wiper hit Venezuela’s energy sector in late 2025, exploiting pre-Windows 10 1803 systems, wiping drives and crippling operations.

title: Toxic Combinations: When Cross-App Permissions Stack into Risk
description:
Toxic combinations form when AI agents, integrations, or OAuth grants
bridge SaaS apps into trust relationships no single admin authorized.

title: Microsoft Patches Critical ASP.NET Core CVE-2026-40372 Privilege Escalation Bug
description: CVE-2026-40372 scores 9.1 due to cryptographic flaw in ASP.NET Core 10.0.0–10.0.6, risking SYSTEM access.

title: Mustang Panda’s New LOTUSLITE Variant Targets India Banks, South Korea Policy Circles
description: Updated LOTUSLITE targets India banking sector via CHM and DLL side-loading, expanding espionage campaign to South Korea and U.S. policy circles.

title: Cohere AI Terrarium Sandbox Flaw Enables Root Code Execution, Container Escape
description: CVE-2026-5752 CVSS 9.3 flaw in Terrarium enables root code execution via Pyodide prototype traversal, risking container escape.

title: SystemBC C2 Server Reveals 1,570+ Victims in The Gentlemen Ransomware Operation
description: SystemBC C2 exposed 1,570+ victims tied to The Gentlemen since July 2025, revealing expanding ransomware scale.

title: 22 BRIDGE:BREAK Flaws Expose Thousands of Lantronix and Silex Serial-to-IP Converters
description: 22 BRIDGE:BREAK flaws in Lantronix and Silex converters expose nearly 20,000 devices online, enabling takeover and data tampering.

title: Ransomware Negotiator Pleads Guilty to Aiding BlackCat Attacks in 2023
description: Ransomware negotiator pleads guilty to aiding BlackCat in 2023; leaked victim data enabled $1.2M extortion and $10M seizure.

title: 5 Places where Mature SOCs Keep MTTR Fast and Others Waste Time
description: Integrated threat intelligence reduces MTTR using data from 15,000 organizations and 600,000 analysts, limiting dwell time and business risk.

title: NGate Campaign Targets Brazil, Trojanizes HandyPay to Steal NFC Data and PINs
description: NGate abuses HandyPay in Brazil since Nov 2025, stealing NFC data and PINs to enable ATM fraud and unauthorized payments.

title: No Exploit Needed: How Attackers Walk Through the Front Door via Identity-Based Attacks
description: Stolen credentials remain top breach vector as AI speeds phishing and testing, increasing ransomware and persistence risk.

title: Google Patches Antigravity IDE Flaw Enabling Prompt Injection Code Execution
description: Antigravity Strict Mode bypass disclosed Jan 7, 2026, patched Feb 28, enables arbitrary code execution via fd -X flag.

title: CISA Adds 8 Exploited Flaws to KEV, Sets April-May 2026 Federal Deadlines
description: CISA adds 8 exploited vulnerabilities to KEV, sets April 23 and May 4, 2026 deadlines, driving urgent federal patching.

title: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Enables RCE via Malicious GGUF Model Files
description: CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) exposes SGLang via /v1/rerank endpoint, enabling RCE through malicious GGUF models, risking server compromise.

title: ⚡ Weekly Recap: Vercel Hack, Push Fraud, QEMU Abused, New Android RATs Emerge & More
description: Monday cybersecurity recap on evolving threats, trusted tool abuse, stealthy in-memory attacks, and shifting access patterns.

title: Why Most AI Deployments Stall After the Demo
description: AI projects stall when clean demos meet messy operations, latency, and governance gaps, limiting enterprise impact.

title: Anthropic MCP Design Vulnerability Enables RCE, Threatening AI Supply Chain
description: MCP design flaw enables RCE across 7,000+ servers and 150M downloads, impacting AI SDKs and supply chains.

title: Researchers Detect ZionSiphon Malware Targeting Israeli Water, Desalination OT Systems
description: ZionSiphon detected June 29, 2025 targets Israeli water OT systems, escalating geopolitical cyber risk.

title: Vercel Breach Tied to Context AI Hack Exposes Limited Customer Credentials
description: Context.ai breach enabled Google Workspace takeover at Vercel, exposing limited customer credentials and prompting $2M data sale claim.

title: [Webinar] Eliminate Ghost Identities Before They Expose Your Enterprise Data
description: Compromised service accounts caused 68% of 2024 cloud breaches, enabling 200-day dwell times and lateral movement across environments.

title: $13.74M Hack Shuts Down Sanctioned Grinex Exchange After Intelligence Claims
description: $13.74M stolen from Grinex on April 15, 2026 after sanctions, disrupting Russia-linked evasion networks.

title: Mirai Variant Nexcorium Exploits CVE-2024-3721 to Hijack TBK DVRs for DDoS Botnet
description: CVE-2024-3721 and CVE-2023-33538 exploited in TBK DVRs and EoL TP-Link routers, enabling Mirai variants and DDoS risk.

title: Three Microsoft Defender Zero-Days Actively Exploited; Two Still Unpatched
description: Three Defender zero-days exploited since April 10, 2026, enabling privilege escalation and DoS, forcing isolation of affected systems.

title: Google Blocks 8.3B Policy-Violating Ads in 2025, Launches Android 17 Privacy Overhaul
description: Google blocked 8.3B ads and suspended 24.9M accounts in 2025 as Android 17 tightened contact and location access, reducing fraud and abuse.

title: NIST Limits CVE Enrichment After 263% Surge in Vulnerability Submissions
description: NIST limits CVE enrichment after 263% surge since 2020, prioritizing KEV and federal software, shifting thousands to “Not Scheduled.”
